interactions.title: Derive unseen inclusion dimensions
interactions.learnerAction: Derive rendering, layout, DOM, tree, direct and sequential focus, form, naming, find, copy, print, and task effects for hidden, CSS-hidden, inert, aria-hidden, and visually hidden variants.

evidence.observable: Each mechanism has exact independent outcomes and no excluded focus or unique meaning remains.
evidence.changedCase: A hidden subtree gains a required field, error, status, and retry action.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Invisible states share one behavior model.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record inclusion-model competency gap.

interactions.title: Debug unseen conditional inclusion
interactions.learnerAction: Repair hidden focus, removed active targets, stale form values, lost errors, excluded unique instructions, duplicate text, invisible skip access, and mismatched open/closed semantics through changed states.

evidence.observable: Rendering, tree, focus, form, naming, and task availability synchronize through entry, exit, removal, and restoration.
evidence.changedCase: The active step closes, disappears, returns, and restores changed saved data.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Remove aria-hidden to solve every conflict.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record inclusion-transition competency gap.

interactions.title: Derive unseen order traces
interactions.learnerAction: Derive source, meaningful reading, visual, accessibility, and focus orders plus dependencies and keyboard continuation under responsive reflow, CSS order, hiding, insertion, and tabindex changes.

evidence.observable: Meaning and operation remain coherent with native focus, visible unobscured indicators, no traps, and no numeric patch.
evidence.changedCase: A desktop sidebar stacks between a field and its instructions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual sequence defines all correct orders.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record order-model competency gap.

interactions.title: Debug unseen keyboard journey
interactions.learnerAction: Repair positive tabindex, nested focusables, focus theft, removed targets, obscured indicators, traps, hover-only actions, missing escape, wrong return, and broken responsive continuation.

evidence.observable: Forward, reverse, activation, escape, removal, error, return, zoom, and narrow-width paths preserve meaning and operation.
evidence.changedCase: An overlay and error summary appear while sticky content obscures focus.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Additional focus scripting stabilizes navigation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record keyboard-order competency gap.

interactions.title: Evaluate unseen ARIA promises
interactions.learnerAction: Choose native replacement, bounded ARIA relation, fully justified custom pattern, or rejection after evaluating role, name, state, property, value, ownership, keyboard, focus, pointer, disabled, escape, result, touch, zoom, and script loss.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent ARIA boundary decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Every retained semantic promise is necessary, conforming, supported, current, and behavior-complete.
evidence.changedCase: Selection model changes, one item disables, and scripting partially fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: ARIA pattern markup guarantees expected behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record ARIA-boundary competency gap.

interactions.title: Debug unseen ARIA lifecycle
interactions.learnerAction: Repair conflicting native roles, prohibited properties, missing required states, duplicate IDs, stale targets, unsynchronized state, incomplete keyboard, wrong focus, missing reset, and dishonest script-failure semantics.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent ARIA lifecycle repair is committed.

evidence.observable: Semantic exposure and behavior transition together through load, change, error, cancel, reset, removal, and reload.
evidence.changedCase: Controlled content is replaced, request fails, and saved state restores.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Correct token values complete the repair.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record ARIA-contract competency gap.

interactions.title: Design claim-specific evaluation
interactions.learnerAction: Match unseen semantic, name, inclusion, keyboard, zoom, contrast, media, form, table, interoperability, usability, and conformance claims to capable complementary evidence and explicit limits.

evidence.observable: Each claim has reproducible setup, task, expected result, changed case, interpretation, limit, repair path, and unresolved risk.
evidence.changedCase: Automation passes while another browser and participant expose failures.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Enough tools and checks combine into proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record evaluation-design competency gap.

interactions.title: Debug an accessibility report
interactions.learnerAction: Repair aggregate score, vague scope, missing environment, irreproducible checks, omitted failures, universal participant claims, conformance-usability confusion, absent retests, and hidden risks in an unseen report.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent evidence report repair is committed.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion is traceable, proportional, reproducible, non-universal, failure-preserving, and explicit about missing evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Tool version, browser, target audience, and a critical task change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Disclaimer language repairs unsupported conclusions.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record reporting competency gap.

interactions.title: Defend one causal repair
interactions.learnerAction: Defend first divergent layer, root cause, rejected surface patches, smallest repair, preserved prerequisites, original and changed task evidence, environment limits, participant scope, residual risk, and next check.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent causal repair defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Defense links mechanism to falsifiable evidence and avoids syntax-, score-, narration-, or happy-path-only proof.
evidence.changedCase: Content, state, viewport, input method, and browser all change after repair.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Passing after patch establishes causal correctness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record causal-defense competency gap.

interactions.title: Defend cumulative access evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Defend all prior HTML paths plus people, semantics, names, inclusion, order, ARIA, and evaluation as one changed task system; bound every claim and refuse accessible, compliant, or certified status without required evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent cumulative access defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Every claim is original, reproducible, prerequisite-linked, mutation-tested, evidence-bounded, non-universal, and honest about review and pilot gaps.
evidence.changedCase: Task, content, language, relationships, state, environment, participant evidence, and policy all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: High inventory and passing checkpoint permit publication claims.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record cumulative evidence gaps for later correction.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, disability-community, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, assistive-technology, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.

Learner-facing copy, original runnable starters, deterministic evidence fixtures, canonical answers, executable checks, representative assistive-technology matrix, observed-user tasks, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
